text: Welcome to the community, Alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a moderator. Thanks for stepping up — we're glad to have you.
Welcome, Kim! 🎉 You've been approved as a member. Make yourself at home!
Welcome, Sam! 🎉 You've been approved as an event helper. Looking forward to your contributions!
Welcome, Lina! 🎉 You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience is going to be invaluable to the community.
